text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 177 

GAP_OONP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
